spec_match.rationale: Same markup rendered with and without the UA stylesheet rule active.

interactive.rationale: 4 interactive markers - toggle the rule and watch the same DOM render differently.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises side-by-side; the page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't cover document outline algorithm history.

openQuestions.title: Explain the document-outline-algorithm history
openQuestions.detail: The UA cascade existed because the outline algorithm was supposed to flatten the document.

openQuestions.title: Offer a polyfill recipe
openQuestions.detail: Provide a copy-pasteable CSS rule (article h1 { font-size: 1.5em }) that restores the look.

summary: Direct visual proof of the deprecation. Explain history and offer author-CSS replacement to make it a how-to.
